title: lessingia micradenia
intro: Lessingia micradenia, also known as Coyote Brush, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Lessingia micradenia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Lessingia micradenia can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
